data.title: AVAX price expected to hit $10.50-$11.00 by April 2026, currently at $9.41 with RSI 48.16. Resistance at $9.93.
data.description: The cryptocurrency AVAX is currently trading at a price of $9.41, with the Relative Strength Index (RSI) indicating a neutral stance at 48.16. According to technical analysis, there is a possibility of AVAX reaching a price range of $10.50-$11.00 by April. However, in order to achieve this target, it will first need to overcome the resistance at $9.93.

data.title: Verne, Pony.ai, and Uber Partner to Launch Europe’s First Commercial Robotaxi Service
data.description: Croatia's capital, Zagreb, will soon witness the launch of Europe's first commercial robotaxi service through a strategic partnership between Verne, Pony AI Inc. (NASDAQ: PONY; HKEX: 2026), a prominent force in autonomous driving technology, and Uber Technologies, Inc. (NYSE: UBER). The groundbreaking initiative is already in progress, with initial steps taken for public-road validation. This collaboration aims to usher in a new era of mobility in the region, with the companies working together on the deployment of a cutting-edge autonomous transport service in the city.
PONY AI AND UBER ARE SET TO INTRODUCE ROBOTAXIS IN CROATIA AS PART OF THEIR EUROPEAN EXPANSION.

data.title: Vitrolife Group has today published its Annual and Sustainability Report for 2025
data.description: A digital version of the Annual and Sustainability Report for Vitrolife Group, based in Gothenburg, Sweden, is now accessible in both English and Swedish on their website www.vitrolifegroup.com as of March 26, 2026. The Annual Report, compliant with the European Single Electronic Format (ESEF), can be viewed specifically in Swedish. The report provides key financial figures and sustainability insights for the company.

data.description: Forecast for the price of DOGE suggests a short-term target of $0.10 to $0.105 within 1 week and a medium-term forecast in the range of $0.11 to $0.15 over the next month. A bullish breakout level is identified at $0.15, while critical support levels were not specified.

data.title: Stelia and Nokia collaborate to advance AI for enterprise
data.description: In London, Stelia AI revealed a partnership with Nokia to enhance the implementation of high-performance, trustworthy AI on a large scale within enterprises. Stelia operates in data-rich enterprise settings globally, supporting governed, high-quality AI operations. Through incorporating Nokia's top-notch open-standards networking tech into its AI framework, Stelia assures consistent performance across expansive systems, tailored for enterprise use.

data.title: Verne, Pony.ai, and Uber Partner to Launch Europe's First Commercial Robotaxi Service
data.description: A new partnership is set to launch in Zagreb and will later extend to other European cities and beyond. The partnership involves Verne and Pony AI Inc. (NASDAQ: PONY; HKEX: 2026), a prominent company specializing in the widespread implementation of autonomous driving technology. Beginning in Zagreb, this initiative marks a significant step towards the global expansion of autonomous driving solutions. Stay tuned for further updates as this venture progresses.

data.title: Cerillion Achieves TM Forum "Diamond-Level" Open API Certification with Industry-Leading Real-World Deployments
data.description: In London on March 26, 2026, Cerillion (AIM: CER), a top supplier of composable BSS/OSS solutions for telecoms, disclosed attaining "Diamond-level" status in TM Forum's Open API Conformance program. This status is given to vendors certifying over a specified number of services.

data.title: Uppsala first in the world with IQ tourism
data.description: In Uppsala, Sweden, a commemorative stone has been erected for an imaginary event, capturing the essence of creativity. Additionally, an artisan perfumery innovatively crafts fragrances akin to compelling narratives. Notably, a cinnamon bun has gained significance as a cultural symbol in the city. These unique features represent novel concepts that have revolutionized our perspectives and are shaping cultural identity. The city's heritage is not only captured in physical artifacts but also in visionary ideas that inspire and challenge conventions, exemplifying the innovative spirit of Uppsala.

data.title: Allergan Aesthetics Reinforces Scientific Differentiation and Leadership with 21 Evidence-Based E-Posters at the 2026 Aesthetic & Anti-Aging Medicine World Congress (AMWC)
data.description: Five scientific electronic posters showcase the investigational neurotoxin TrenibotulinumtoxinE (TrenibotE), indicating rapid enhancement in glabellar lines within 8 hours, consistent and strong effectiveness, and a safe profile among diverse patient groups worldwide.

data.title: The New Language of Gourmand: Hamidi Captivates Cosmoprof Bologna
data.description: In Bologna, Italy on March 26, 2026, Hamidi captivated the audience at Cosmoprof Bologna with a nuanced approach. The spotlight was on indulgence, highlighted by two key fragrances at the event - Fondue Tropical and Fondue Exotic. These scents defined the essence of the showcase, showcasing a blend of elegance and luxury.
